sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n451" key="a)genealo/ghtos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀγενεᾱλόγητος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n451.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">of unrecorded descent, Ep.Heb.</tr_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0012.tlg001.perseus-grc1:7:3" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">7.3</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
